title: Pin Object
description: Electrical connection point in a symbol; defines position, direction, and display.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

properties.name: angle
properties.description: Rotation angle in degrees, counter-clockwise from the positive X axis (0, 90, 180, or 270).

properties.name: contact
properties.description: Contact (pad or SMD) assigned to this pin through the device connect map.

properties.name: contacts
properties.description: Contacts (pads or SMDs) assigned to this pin through the device connect map.

properties.name: function
properties.description: Graphical symbol (inverter or clock) drawn next to this pin.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: length
properties.description: Graphical length of the pin wire in the symbol.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Pin name as defined in the library.

properties.name: net
properties.description: Net name to which this pin is connected (schematic context only).

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: route
properties.description: Route connection type for this pin (All or Any).

properties.name: swapLevel
properties.description: Swap level for pin swapping; pins with the same level can be swapped.

properties.name: visible
properties.description: Which name is displayed for this pin.

properties.name: x
properties.description: X coordinate of the connection point, in internal units.

properties.name: y
properties.description: Y coordinate of the connection point, in internal units.
